title: jumellea rutenbergiana
intro: Jumellea rutenbergiana, also known as the African orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Jumellea rutenbergiana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Jumellea rutenbergiana can be made by infusing the plant's roots and leaves in water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams.
